name: Mold Inspectors
description: The most comprehensive directory of CMI- and ACAC-credentialed mold inspectors, air-quality testers, and remediation specialists in the United States.
certifications: IAC2 Certified Indoor Air Quality Inspector
cityPagePromptContext:
Mold inspectors assess buildings for mold growth and indoor air quality issues.
Credentialed professionals (CMI, ACAC CMC/CMRS) perform visual inspections,
moisture mapping, and air/surface sampling sent to third-party labs. Homeowners
hire them during home purchase inspections, after water intrusion events
(plumbing leaks, floods, roof damage), or when occupants have persistent
respiratory symptoms. Reports identify the species, extent, and likely cause,
and recommend remediation protocols.
buyerSearchContext: when buying a home, after water damage, or when experiencing unexplained respiratory symptoms

editorialAuthor.name: Nick Palmer
editorialAuthor.title: Founder & Lead Researcher
editorialAuthor.bio: Nick built this directory to help homeowners find credentialed mold inspectors without wading through contractors who mostly want to sell remediation — a conflict of interest he ran into when trying to assess his own home after a plumbing leak.

schema.label: State Licensed Mold Inspector/Assessor
schema.scrape_hint: Look for license numbers, state credentials (e.g., 'Texas TDLR License #12345'), or explicit mentions of state certification on homepage, about page, or footer.

schema.label: Years of Experience
schema.scrape_hint: Extract from 'About Us', team bios, or '15+ years serving [area]' statements; calculate from founding year if business start date is provided.

schema.label: Professional Certifications
schema.scrape_hint: Scan certifications section, team credentials, or logos for IICRC, thermography institutes, IAQ training programs, or water testing credentials; match exact acronyms and full names.

schema.label: Moisture Detection Specialist
schema.scrape_hint: Check for mentions of 'moisture mapping', 'moisture intrusion detection', 'moisture meter use', or EPA-aligned language about moisture control in services or methodology pages.

schema.label: Independent (No Remediation Ties)
schema.scrape_hint: Look for statements like 'we do not perform remediation', 'unbiased third-party inspection', 'no conflict of interest', or absence of cleanup/restoration services in offerings.

schema.label: Report Turnaround Time
schema.scrape_hint: Extract from service descriptions, FAQs, or 'What to Expect' sections; look for phrases like 'report delivered within 24 hours' or 'results in 2 business days'.

schema.label: Service Types Offered
schema.scrape_hint: Parse services menu, homepage offerings, or industry-specific pages; match keywords like 'home mold inspection', 'commercial IAQ', 'clearance testing', or 'buyer/seller inspections'.

schema.label: Phone Number
schema.scrape_hint: Extract from header, footer, contact page, or click-to-call buttons; normalize to standard format (e.g., (555) 123-4567).

schema.label: Website
schema.scrape_hint: Capture primary domain from browser address bar, homepage links, or business listings; ensure full URL with https:// protocol.
